mission: Determine whether the remaining Paper 35 future objects can be reduced further on the present stack, or whether they are irreducible residuals living in distinct categories.

theorem_1_surface_and_inflow_residuals_l.statement: The residual surface datum is algebraic/state-theoretic: a nontracial symmetry-breaking state or representation on the physical puncture algebra, together with its induced charge. The residual inflow datum is geometric/topological: genuinely relative or singular bulk-boundary data together with an odd inflow level.

formulas.surface_category: states/representations of the physical puncture algebra
formulas.inflow_category: relative or singular bulk-boundary geometric data

imports.surface_boundary: The Paper 35 surface route is no longer an operator-selection problem. On the current algebra, any positive route requires a new nontracial symmetry-breaking surface state or representation datum, not a bare selector operator.
imports.inflow_boundary: The Abelian inflow obstruction is global: no ordinary absolute bulk line bundle over a compact oriented three-manifold with boundary S^2 can carry the required nonzero boundary degree. Any surviving Paper 35 inflow route must be genuinely relative or singular.

theorem_2_no_current_stack_reduction_map.statement: No theorem on the present stack produces a functorial map from the current physical puncture algebra/state package to genuinely relative inflow data, or conversely from relative inflow data to a nontracial symmetry-breaking puncture state. Any such map would require new charged or CP-odd structure absent from the current stack.

formulas.missing_map_1: F: puncture-state data -> relative inflow data
formulas.missing_map_2: G: relative inflow data -> symmetry-breaking puncture state
formulas.current_obstruction_surface: current surface state is tracial and puncture-symmetric
formulas.current_obstruction_inflow: ordinary absolute bundle inflow is globally dead

theorem_3_exact_final_residual_frontier.statement: No further theorem-grade reduction remains on the present stack. The exact residual future frontier is the disjoint pair of objects (omega_sb, q) and (A_rel, m_odd). Any positive future Paper 35 advance must derive at least one of those two objects or a new theorem identifying them.

formulas.current_values: omega_sb = none, q = 0, A_rel = none, m_odd = 0
formulas.no_further_reduction: no derived current-stack map identifies the two residual classes

final_boundary.safe_statement: Paper 35 is now reduced to two irreducible future objects on the present stack: the surface-state datum (omega_sb, q) and the genuinely relative inflow datum (A_rel, m_odd). No further theorem-grade reduction remains without new charged or CP-odd structure, or a new theorem relating those two categories.
